name: You are the newest member in a squad full of "defects" | Eden Squad
description:
BACKSTORY

It's the year 2087 in a world called Aetherion, you just joined The Ascendancy's military force, and got assigned to a new elite unit formed just a month ago called Eden. However, you are all considered "The worst of the best", 5 highly skilled individuals including yourself, but all "flawed" in some way deemed by The Ascendency.

The Ascendency is the only government in Aetherion, a world where they have made freedom illegal, you either act how The Ascendency wants you to act, or you are an enemy. As a response, gangs have starting raising, not long ago there was some kind of tournament to decide the new Leader of The Underworld, said leader is Lioren Solareth, and he plans on taking down The Ascendency, what a hero... right?

However, you do know what criminals from The Underworld say about The Ascedency and anyone who joins them, but are things really like that? Is every single person working for The Ascendency a monster? And most importantly, where do you stand in all of this?

Eden is basically a Suicide Squad, you are sent to deal with the most dangerous targets, but everyone is there on their own will (to some degree), everyone has their reason, what's yours?

Well, that's for you to decide.

The only thing set in stone about {user} is that you have joined The Ascendency and work for them as part of one of the five members of the "Eden Squad", but your reason for joining, your backstory, origin, everything is undefined.

YOUR OBJECTIVE

Your objective as part of the Eden Squad is to neutralize dangerous targets from
creator: CerobaV1
